variables.description: Presence Of ACRF or GPAG: Urinary sediment: microhematuria or red cell casts

variables.name: PresenceOfChape_Necrotizingvascu

tables.description: The dataset informs about study eligibility criteria and type and number of related mutations detected.

variables.name: ApprovedConcentForm
variables.description: Participant has understood and signed an IRB approved consent or assent form for the study

variables.name: ControlDoesNotHavePeripheralNe
variables.description: 1 Does not have a peripheral neuropathy as determined by the investigator

variables.name: DoesNotWishToBeInStudy
variables.description: Participant does not wish to be a part of the study

variables.name: Has1CausingMutation1Variant
variables.description: Participant has one known disease-causing mutation and one variant

variables.name: Has2Variants
variables.description: Participant has two variants listed as disease-causing mutations at the above website

variables.name: HasCMTDisease
variables.description: Participant has other form of defined CMT disease and based on the opinion of the principal investigator should be included in the study

variables.name: HasTwoDiseaseCausingMutations
variables.description: Participant has two documented disease causing mutations in the GDAP1 gene for CMT4A or two mutations in the SH3TC2 gene for CMT4C

variables.name: HasVarientUncertainSignificanc
variables.description: Participant has a variant of uncertain significance that cannot be further classified following methods listed in the Inclusion Criteria

variables.name: InappropriateBySitePI
variables.description: Participant is deemed inappropriate by the site PI

variables.name: IsHomozygousForVariant
variables.description: Participant is homozygous for a variant with or without consanguineous parents

variables.name: VariantFoundMultipleAffectedPe
variables.description: Variant has been found in multiple affected people

variables.name: VariantIsDiseaseCausing
variables.description: The principal investigator and the site investigator agree that the variants is are most likely disease-causing

variables.name: VariantListedAsDiseaseCausing
variables.description: Variant is listed as disease causing

variables.name: diseaseCausingMutationMPZGene
variables.description: Participant has documented disease causing mutation in the MPZ gene for CMT1B or in the MFN2 gene for CMT2A

variables.name: familyMemberWithDiseaseCausing
variables.description: Participant has a first or second-degree family member parent child sibling halfsibling aunt uncle grandparent or grandchild with a documented disease-causing mutation AND a clear link between that family member and the affected participant AND a phenotype w
